list.label: X-axis
list.name: x_axis_metrics
list.query: Temperature (50K plate) : refrigerator_temperature{instance="$instance"\, stage="plate_50k"}, Temperature (4K plate) : refrigerator_temperature{instance="$instance"\, stage="plate_4k"}, Temperature (Still plate) : refrigerator_temperature{instance="$instance"\, stage="still"}, Temperature (MXC plate) : refrigerator_temperature{instance="$instance"\, stage="mxc"}, Pressure (Chamber) : refrigerator_pressure{instance="$instance"\, location="chamber_internal"\, unit="pascal"}, Pressure (Exhaust pump) : refrigerator_pressure{instance="$instance"\, location="exhaust_pump"\, unit="pascal"}, Pressure (Still-TMP) : refrigerator_pressure{instance="$instance"\, location="still_tmp"\, unit="pascal"}, Pressure (Tank) : refrigerator_pressure{instance="$instance"\, location="tank"\, unit="kilopascal"}, Pressure (Before TRAP) : refrigerator_pressure{instance="$instance"\, location="before_trap"\, unit="kilopascal"}, Pressure (After TRAP) : refrigerator_pressure{instance="$instance"\, location="after_trap"\, unit="kilopascal"}, Helium flow : refrigerator_helium_flow{instance="$instance"\, unit="micromoles per second"}, Device status (scroll1) : refrigerator_device_status{instance="$instance"\, component="scroll1"}, Device status (scroll2) : refrigerator_device_status{instance="$instance"\, component="scroll2"}, Device status (turbo1) : refrigerator_device_status{instance="$instance"\, component="turbo1"}, Device status (turbo2) : refrigerator_device_status{instance="$instance"\, component="turbo2"}, Device status (pulsetube) : refrigerator_device_status{instance="$instance"\, component="pulsetube"}, Compressor frequency (actual_spd) : refrigerator_compressor{instance="$instance"\, rotation="actual_spd"}, Compressor frequency (actual_spd2) : refrigerator_compressor{instance="$instance"\, rotation="actual_spd2"}, Compressor frequency (actual_spd3) : refrigerator_compressor{instance="$instance"\, rotation="actual_spd3"}, Compressor pressure (alp) : refrigerator_compressor_pressure{instance="$instance"\, side="alp"\, unit="megapascal"}, Compressor pressure (alp2) : refrigerator_compressor_pressure{instance="$instance"\, side="alp2"\, unit="megapascal"}
